exercises.title: Crypto Dependency Scanner
exercises.description: Build a tool to scan application code for cryptographic dependencies.
tasks: Parse source files for crypto imports
Classify each dependency by migration urgency
exercises.expectedOutput: Crypto dependency scanner with migration report
hints: Use AST parsing for accurate detection
Include common library patterns (cryptography, openssl, nacl)
Provide line numbers for each finding

exercises.title: Hybrid Crypto Wrapper
exercises.description: Create a hybrid cryptography wrapper library.
exercises.expectedOutput: Hybrid crypto wrapper with classical fallback
hints: Make the wrapper agnostic to specific algorithms

exercises.title: Migration Test Generator
exercises.description: Build a tool to generate migration test cases.
tasks: Generate test templates for each category
exercises.expectedOutput: Migration test case generator and runner
hints: Include edge cases for algorithm negotiation
Generate both positive and negative tests

exercises.title: Feature Flag Manager
exercises.description: Create a feature flag manager for PQC rollout.
exercises.expectedOutput: Feature flag manager for controlled PQC rollout
hints: Hash user IDs for consistent rollout
Include kill switch for emergency rollback
Separate flags for different features (KEM, DSA)
